highlights.title: Full Telethon API Coverage
highlights.description: CLI, Web, and Agent wrappers for all Telethon transport operations: forward, edit, delete, pin/unpin messages, download media, participants, admin/permissions management, broadcast stats.

highlights.title: Chat Management Module
highlights.description: New permission group 'Управление чатом' with get-participants, edit-admin, edit-permissions, kick-participant, archive/unarchive, mark-read operations.

highlights.title: Forward Messages
highlights.description: Full CLI/Web/Agent implementation for forwarding messages between Telegram chats with confirmation prompts and pool rotation.

highlights.title: Agent Toolset Expansion
highlights.description: Agent now exposes 117 tools covering all CLI commands and API endpoints with per-phone tool permissions.

highlights.title: list_generated_images Fix
highlights.description: Fixed CLI/Web parity gaps for generated images listing and corrected agent tool registration.
